title: helenium borchersii
intro: Helenium borchersii, also known as Borchers' Sneezeweed, is a plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant contains medicinal properties, including sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Helenium borchersii include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. Helenium borchersii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosage.
